# Transcrição: 1. Same Day Contact – Thank you

- **Fonte:** 1. Same Day Contact – Thank you
- **Duração:** 00:50
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:50]

Okay, so it's the same day call. You made contact with a customer today. You didn't close the deal, no problem. What I want you to do on the same day is I want you to send a thank you text, a simple text in the first hour that you made contact either over the internet, the phone, or in person. The same time right now as soon as this got consummated or in this case didn't get consummated, I want you to send a simple text. Thank you for coming by your name and your number. Simple. Now when you're done with that, I want you to wait about an hour and I want you to call and say again I want to thank you. It's really special meeting you and that's it. Text the same day and a call. If you don't know what to do tomorrow, check back in. I'll show you what to do 24 hours later.
